SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") is made on the 15th day of October 2023, by and between:

1. Dr. Tan Wei Ming, NRIC: S2345678D, residing at 123 Orchard Road, Singapore 238888, contact: +65 9123 4567, email: drtan@fictmail.sg; and 
2. Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, NRIC: S3456789E, residing at 456 Jurong West, Singapore 640456, contact: +65 9876 5432, email: sitiaishah@fictmail.sg; 
3. Ramasamy Muthu, NRIC: S4567890F, residing at 789 Bedok North, Singapore 460789.

Collectively referred to as the "Parties".

WHEREAS, Dr. Tan Wei Ming owns 10,000 shares in Fictitious Pte. Ltd., UEN: 199999999K, a company incorporated under the laws of Singapore with its registered office at 789 Cecil Street, Singapore 049789.

AND WHEREAS, Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah agrees to purchase the said shares for a total consideration of SGD 500,000.

It is hereby agreed as follows:

1. The SPA shall govern the terms and conditions of this transaction.
2. This SPA does not include any project plan or project status evaluation.
3. For further details, visit https://example.sg/user/S2345678D.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this SPA on the date first above written.
